problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
mechanism: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating
hypothesis: The key to What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale? is Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating — specifically Atomic layer deposition — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
